name: 📝 Data correction

assignees: Lechr11
---

**Shelter ID:**
e.g., `krotoszyn-ceglarska-11` (find in URL: `/api/v1/shelters/by-id/{id}.json`)

**URL of the shelter:**
https://otwarteschroniska.org.pl/api/v1/shelters/by-id/...

**Field(s) to correct:**
e.g., `telefon`, `email`, `godziny`, `adres`

**Current (wrong) value:**

**Correct value:**

**Source of correct information:**
- [ ] Shelter's own website (link: ...)
- [ ] Official document (link or attachment)
- [ ] I work at this shelter (admin email matches)
- [ ] Personal verification (called shelter on phone)
- [ ] Other (please describe)

**Additional context:**

---

⏱️ SLA: ≤5 dni roboczych. Single maintainer, please be patient.
